rules.rule_text:
rule jjEncode
{
	meta:
		description = "jjencode detection"
		ref = "http://blog.xanda.org/2015/06/10/yara-rule-for-jjencode/"
		author = "adnan.shukor@gmail.com"
		date = "10-June-2015"
		version = "1"
		impact = 3
		hide = false

	strings:
		$jjencode = /(\$|[\S]+)=~\[\]\;(\$|[\S]+)\=\{[\_]{3}\:[\+]{2}(\$|[\S]+)\,[\$]{4}\:\(\!\[\]\+["]{2}\)[\S]+/ fullword

	condition:
		$jjencode
}
